base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of char_select_ww — a ui (dialog) from 1991 street fighter ii. Original 8-fighter select grid (World Warrior) + 'PLAYER SELECT' banner. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Original 8-fighter select grid (World Warrior) + 'PLAYER SELECT' banner
